tools.name: utility_generate_qr_code
tools.description:
Use this when you need to generate a QR code from text, a URL, or any string data. Returns base64 image data in JSON.

Returns: 1. image (base64-encoded PNG) 2. width and height in pixels 3. data (the encoded input string) 4. format (png).

Example output: {"data":"https://example.com","image":"iVBO
